title: The War Is Back On
text:
The Iran Reckoning with Afshon Ostovar
Join renowned Iran expert Afshon Ostovar as he explores the strategic dynamics, military developments, and geopolitical tensions shaping Iran and its partners, rivals, and interests in the Middle East and beyond.

Become a member

The War Is Back On
The Iran Reckoning with Afshon Ostovar
Gregory Brew and Afshon Ostovar
July 18, 2026

Sign up now and start listening to "The Iran Reckoning with Afshon Ostovar!"Already a member? Sign In to have access to our podcasts

Episode Notes:
The U.S.-Iranian Memorandum of Understanding is on ice. Afshon talks with Gregory Brew, an analyst at Eurasia Group, about how Iranian leadership is reading the war — especially Iran’s role in the Strait of Hormuz. They dig into the strange story of former President Mahmoud Ahmadinejad’s alleged role in an Israeli plan to install him as Iran’s new leader, and close with what renewed fighting could mean for global oil markets.
